subject: two goblins inside a library causing chaos — one crouching, one rearing back with a fire bolt erupting from its raised arm
description: Two stout goblin figures tear through what appears to be a library or study. The left goblin crouches low in a wide stance, mouth open, looking toward the right. The right goblin is larger and rears back dramatically, with a vivid streak of flame shooting from or around its raised right arm. Both figures have the classic goblin build — squat, broad-shouldered, large heads with pronounced features. Bookshelves and books are visible in the background, and loose pages scatter through the air. A desk or table is visible in the lower foreground. The palette is dominated by warm reds and oranges from the goblins' skin tones and the flame against cooler browns and greens of the library setting.
foreground: two goblins in dynamic poses, fire bolt visible, scattered pages and debris
background: library shelves with books, scattered papers, wooden furniture
emotion: chaotic glee — wide stances, open mouths, energetic body language
